allow: Bash(ssh ha "sed -i.bak -e ''739,/^- id:/d; 756,/^- id:/d'' /config/automations.yaml 2>&1 || echo ''sed failed, trying different approach''")

Bash(ssh ha "awk ''/^- id: .test_forecast_debug.|^- id: .1730337600001_debug./{flag=1} flag && /^- id:/ && !/^- id: .test_forecast_debug.|^- id: .1730337600001_debug./{flag=0} !flag'' /config/automations.yaml > /tmp/automations_cleaned.yaml && mv /tmp/automations_cleaned.yaml /config/automations.yaml && echo ''Debug automations removed''")

Bash(ssh ha "head -738 /config/automations.yaml > /config/automations.yaml.new && cat /config/automations.yaml.new > /config/automations.yaml && rm /config/automations.yaml.new && echo ''Removed debug automations (kept first 738 lines)''")
